channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BIZOTIC] Bizotic Commercial Ltd Board Approves Allotment of 2,64,000 Equity Shares Upon Conversion of Warrants
item.description:
Bizotic Commercial Ltd announced that its Board of Directors has approved the allotment of 2,64,000 fully paid-up Equity Shares pursuant to the conversion of 2,64,000 convertible warrants. The warrants were held by M/s. Bizotic Nexus Private Limited, a Promoter and Promoter Group entity. The allotment was made at an issue price of Rs. 290.00/- per share, including a premium of Rs. 280.00/- per share, upon receipt of the balance amount of 75.00% of the issue price per warrant. The total amount received for the allotment was Rs. 5,74,20,000/-. The newly issued Equity Shares will rank pari passu with the existing Equity Shares of the Company in all respects.

  • Bizotic Commercial Ltd approves allotment of 2,64,000 Equity Shares
  • Allotment pursuant to conversion of 2,64,000 convertible warrants
  • Allotment price of Rs. 290.00/- per share with a premium of Rs. 280.00/- per share
  • Total amount received of Rs. 5,74,20,000/-
  • Newly issued Equity Shares to rank pari passu with existing Equity Shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bizotic Commercial Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [SEVL] Supertech EV Ltd: Promoter and Promoter Group Confirm No Encumbrance Over Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Supertech EV Ltd has declared that the Promoter and Promoter Group, along with persons acting in concert, have not made any encumbrance over the shares held by them in the company during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This declaration is in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulation, 2011. The announcement was made by Yetender Sharma, Gettanjali Sharma, and Gaurav Aapan, who are key figures in the Promoter and Promoter Group.

  • Supertech EV Ltd Promoter and Promoter Group confirm no encumbrance over shares in FY 2025-2026
  • Declaration made in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulation, 2011
  • Yetender Sharma, Gettanjali Sharma, and Gaurav Aapan involved in the declaration
  • No encumbrance made over the shares held by Promoter and Promoter Group during the financial year ended March 31, 2026
  • Supertech EV Ltd operates in Haryana, India with manufacturing units in Asodha Todran, Rohad, Khewat No-395/353, Khata No-433khasra No-53/12-53/9, Bahadurgarh, Jhajjar, Haryana, 124507 and Udyog Vihar, Back Side Hero Honda Agency, Sankhol village, Bahadurgarh, Jhajjar, Haryana, 124507

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Supertech Ev Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [BIZOTIC] Bizotic Commercial Ltd Allots 2,64,000 Equity Shares Post Conversion of Warrants
item.description:
Bizotic Commercial Ltd has allotted 2,64,000 Equity Shares pursuant to the conversion of 2,64,000 convertible warrants. The allotment was made at an issue price of Rs. 290.00/- per share (including a premium of Rs. 280.00/- per share) to M/s. Bizotic Nexus Private Limited, a Promoter and Promoter Group category allottee. The allotment has been made for cash upon receipt of the remaining exercise price of Rs. 217.50/- per warrant, aggregating to Rs. 5,74,20,000/-. The Equity Shares allotted pursuant to the exercise of warrants on a preferential basis shall rank pari passu with the existing Equity Shares of the Company in all respects. The paid-up equity share capital of the Company has increased from Rs. 9,37,80,000/- to Rs. 9,64,20,000/- post allotment.

  • Allotment of 2,64,000 Equity Shares pursuant to conversion of warrants.
  • Allotment made to M/s. Bizotic Nexus Private Limited at an issue price of Rs. 290.00/- per share.
  • Allotment for cash upon receipt of the remaining exercise price of Rs. 217.50/- per warrant.
  • Increase in the paid-up equity share capital from Rs. 9,37,80,000/- to Rs. 9,64,20,000/- post allotment.
  • Company to make an application to the Stock Exchange for listing and trading of the newly issued and allotted Equity Shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bizotic Commercial Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HDFCBANK] HDFC Bank Ltd. to Consider Issuing Perpetual Debt Instruments and Bonds
item.description:
HDFC Bank Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 18, 2026, to consider the issuance of Perpetual Debt Instruments, Tier II Capital Bonds, and Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors over the next twelve months. This decision is in continuation with the bank's intimation dated March 24, 2026, and is in line with the requirements of the Reserve Bank of India's Regulations, 2015.

  • HDFC Bank Ltd. to consider issuing Perpetual Debt Instruments, Tier II Capital Bonds, and Long-Term Bonds.
  • The bank's Board of Directors will meet on April 18, 2026, to discuss the issuance.
  • The issuance is part of the bank's plan to finance Infrastructure Sub-Sectors over the next twelve months.
  • The decision is in line with the Reserve Bank of India's Regulations, 2015.
  • The announcement follows the bank's intimation dated March 24, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HDFC Bank Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [METAINFO] Meta Infotech Secures Rs. 21.43 Crore Renewal Order from a Leading Private Sector Bank
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Meta Infotech Ltd. has announced the receipt of a significant renewal order amounting to Rs. 21.43 crores from a major domestic private sector bank. The order is for license subscription for mobile application security for the period from September 01, 2025, to August 31, 2026. The order is expected to be executed within 7 days.

  • Meta Infotech has secured a renewal order of Rs. 21.43 crores from a leading private sector bank.
  • The order is for license subscription for mobile application security for the period from September 01, 2025, to August 31, 2026.
  • The order is expected to be executed within 7 days.
  • The order is a part of the company's ordinary course of business.
  • The bank is one of the largest private sector banks in India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meta Infotech Ltd | Category: Renewal Order

item.title: [VINRKLB] Rekvina Laboratories Ltd Receives Open Offer from Surbhit Mukesh Shah, Amit Mukesh Shah, and Dhruvalkumar Patel
item.description:
Rekvina Laboratories Ltd has received an Open Offer from Surbhit Mukesh Shah, Amit Mukesh Shah, and Dhruvalkumar Patel to acquire up to 28,90,100 fully paid-up equity shares, representing 26% of the Expanded Share Capital. The offer is priced at ₹ 10/- per Equity Share, payable in cash. The offer is not conditional upon any minimum level of acceptance and does not require any statutory approvals except for those mentioned in the Draft Letter of Offer. The Acquirers have the option to revise the Offer Price prior to the commencement of the last 1 (One) Working Day before the commencement of the Tendering Period.

  • Rekvina Laboratories Ltd has received an Open Offer from Surbhit Mukesh Shah, Amit Mukesh Shah, and Dhruvalkumar Patel.
  • The Offer is for up to 28,90,100 fully paid-up equity shares, representing 26% of the Expanded Share Capital.
  • The offer price is ₹ 10/- per Equity Share, payable in cash.
  • The offer is not conditional upon any minimum level of acceptance.
  • The Offer does not require any statutory approvals except for those mentioned in the Draft Letter of Offer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rekvina Laboratories Ltd | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [RECLTD] REC Ltd Appoints Rajesh Kumar as Director (Finance) for Five Years
item.description:
REC Ltd, a CPSE engaged in engineering and project consultancy, has appointed Rajesh Kumar as Director (Finance) for a period of five years. Kumar, a seasoned finance professional with over 30 years of experience, is a Chartered Accountant and Cost & Management Accountant. He has served REC Limited for over 20 years, demonstrating exceptional leadership in finance and resource mobilization. His tenure at REC has been marked by the introduction of innovative bond structures, expansion of the investor base, and reductions in the overall cost of borrowings. He has also overseen multilateral funding, Asset Liability Management, ESG projects, and IT transformation within the organization.

  • Rajesh Kumar appointed as Director (Finance) of REC Limited
  • Appointment for a period of five years
  • Kumar is a seasoned finance professional with over 30 years of experience
  • Kumar has served REC Limited for over 20 years
  • Kumar has been instrumental in transforming REC's domestic resource mobilization strategy

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: REC Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SWASTIKA] Swastika Investmart Ltd Receives Order from Income Tax Appellate Tribunal, Reducing Tax Demand to Nil for FY 2014-15
item.description:
Swastika Investmart Ltd has received an Order from the Income Tax Appellate Tribunal Mumbai, Bench u/s 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961 for financial year 2014-15. The Order, bearing ITA No. 6214/MUM/2025 dated March 12, 2026, has been issued by the Assistant Registrar of the Income Tax Appellate Tribunal, Mumbai Bench. Pursuant to the submissions and representations made by the Company, the tax demand u/s 143(3) for the FY 2014-15 has been reduced, and the demand now stands at Nil. However, proceedings in respect of the demand raised under Section 156 of the Income Tax Act, 1961, pertaining to amount Rs. 50.50 lakhs, are still pending before the Commissioner of Income-tax (Appeals).

  • Swastika Investmart Ltd receives Order from Income Tax Appellate Tribunal Mumbai for FY 2014-15.
  • Tax demand under Section 143(3) of Income Tax Act, 1961 reduced to Nil.
  • Proceedings under Section 156 of Income Tax Act, 1961 for amount Rs. 50.50 lakhs still pending before the Commissioner of Income-tax (Appeals).
  • No impact on the operations of the Company from the litigations/disputes/assessment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SWASTIKA INVESTMART LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [PNB] Punjab National Bank Reports Provisional Business Figures for Q4 2026 with Growth in Deposits and Advances
item.description:
Punjab National Bank has released its provisional business figures for the period ended 31.03.2026. The bank reported growth in both global and domestic deposits, as well as advances. Global deposits grew by 2.93%, while domestic deposits increased by 3.08%. Global advances saw a growth of 12.17%, and domestic advances increased by 12.97%. The bank's statutory central auditors have reported a growth of 10.79% and 10.39% in global and domestic business respectively.

  • Global deposits grew by 2.93%
  • Domestic deposits increased by 3.08%
  • Global advances saw a growth of 12.17%
  • Domestic advances increased by 12.97%
  • Statutory central auditors reported a growth of 10.79% and 10.39% in global and domestic business respectively

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB NATIONAL BANK | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [CHENNPETRO] Chennai Petroleum Corporation Ltd Appoints Shri V.C. Asokan as Non-Executive Nominee Director
item.description:
Chennai Petroleum Corporation Ltd (CPCL) has appointed Shri V.C. Asokan as a Non-Executive Nominee Director on its Board, representing Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL), the Holding Company. The appointment is effective from 02.04.2026. Shri Asokan holds a Master’s Degree in Business Management and has over three decades of rich and diverse experience in the oil and gas sector. He has consistently demonstrated excellence in leadership roles across various states in India and at Lanka IOC PLC, a subsidiary of IndianOil in Sri Lanka.

  • Shri V.C. Asokan appointed as Non-Executive Nominee Director on CPCL Board
  • Appointment effective from 02.04.2026
  • Shri Asokan has over 30 years of experience in the oil and gas sector
  • He has held leadership roles across various states in India and at Lanka IOC PLC
  • Shri Asokan holds a Master’s Degree in Business Management

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHENNAI PETROLEUM CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
